zh., Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德

zh.Hepple, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德賀普爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Chartney於大約1264年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，她的父親Richard de Chartney30歲，母親Ethama25歲。她於大約1284年與LUCAS TALIBOYS在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德賀普爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Hepple, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德賀普爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Chartney于大约1264年出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，她的父亲Richard de Chartney30岁，母亲Ethama25岁。她于大约1284年与LUCAS TALIBOYS在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德賀普爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Chartney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Limerick): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAthairne, a personal name based on athair ‘father’, originally of three syllables. The English t is intrusive and the surname was earlier Anglicized as Harney .

variants.name: Harney
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAthairne ‘descendant of Athairne’, a personal name based on athair ‘father’, originally of three syllables and borne by a famous Old Irish satirist. The surname was sometimes also Anglicized as Hartney .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Chartney was born about 1264, in Northumberland, England, her father, Richard de Chartney, was 30 and her mother, Ethama, was 25. She married LUCAS TALIBOYS about 1284, in Hepple, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Chartney est née environ 1264, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Chartney, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Ethama, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé LUCAS TALIBOYS environ 1284, à Hepple, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Chartney um 1264 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Chartney 30 und ihre Mutter Ethama 25. Sie hat um 1284 in Hepple, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom LUCAS TALIBOYS geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Chartney è nata il circa 1264 nel Northumberland, England, sua padre, Richard de Chartney, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Ethama, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato LUCAS TALIBOYS circa 1284, nel Hepple, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Chartneyが約1264年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Richard de Chartneyは30歳，母Ethamaは25歳であった。約1284年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドヘップルでLUCAS TALIBOYSと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Chartney(이)가 대략 1264년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Chartney(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ethama(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1284년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 헤플에서 LUCAS TALIBOYS(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Chartney nasceu aproximadamente 1264, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Chartney, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Ethama, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com LUCAS TALIBOYS aproximadamente 1284, em Hepple, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Chartney родилась около 1264 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Chartney было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ethama, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени LUCAS TALIBOYS около 1284 г. в местности хеппл, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Chartney nació aproximadamente 1264, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Chartney, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Ethama, tenía 25 años. Se casó con LUCAS TALIBOYS aproximadamente 1284, en Hepple, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
